valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Wed 25 Feb 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Thu 26 Feb 2026
general_synopsis: New low moving steadily northeast, expected Norwegian Basin 990 by 0600 tomorrow

Viking.text:
Wind
In west, southwesterly 4 to 6. In east, southerly 6 to gale 8, veering southwesterly 4 to 6 later.
Sea state
In west, moderate or rough. in east, rough or very rough becoming moderate or rough.
Weather
Rain, fog patches.
Visibility
In west, moderate or good, occasionally very poor. In east, moderate to very poor.
